introLine2.default: Choose the option that works best for you.

default.name: Pricing Package 1
default.tagline: Perfect for first-timers or occasional visits.
default.featuresText:
Full facility access
Towel & locker included
90-minute session

default.name: Pricing Package 2

default.featuresText:
Unlimited sessions
Priority booking

1 guest pass / month

default.name: Pricing Package 3

default.featuresText:

noteText.default: All prices inclusive of GST. Questions?
